title: The Factoring Regulation Act, 2011
full_text: The Factoring Regulation Act, 2011 फैक्टरिंग विनियमन अधिनियम, 2011 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201212 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 2012-01-22 Act Year: 2012 Short Title: The Factoring Regulation Act, 2011 Hindi Title: फैक्टरिंग विनियमन अधिनियम, 2011 Long Title: An Act to provide for and regulate assignment of receivables by making provision for registration there for and rights and obligations of parties to contract for assignment of receivables and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 02-04-2012 Notification: 2nd April, 2012 (Ss. 19, 20, 21, 32), vide notification No. S.O. 711(E), dated 2nd April, 2012, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii). 1st February, 2012 (expect ss. 19, 20, 21 and 32), vide notification No. S.O. 1399(E), dated 21st June, 2012, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Factoring Regulation Act, 2011 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II REGISTRATION OF FACTORS CHAPTER III ASSIGNMENT OF RECEIVABLES CHAPTER IV RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF PARTIES TO CONTRACT FOR ASSIGMENT OF RECEIVABLES CHAPTER V REGISTRATION OF ASSIGNMENTS CHAPTER VI OFFENCES AND PENALTIES CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Registration of factors. Section 4. Provisions of non-banking financial companies apply to factor. Section 5. Requirement for registration as a factor not to apply to bank or Statutory corporation or Government company. Section 6. Powers of Reserve Bank to give directions and to collect information from factors. Section 7. Assignment of receivables. Section 8. Notice to debtor and discharge of obligation of such debtor. Section 9. Discharge of liability of debtor on payment to assignee. Section 10. Payment made by debtor to assignor to be held in trust for benefit of assignee in certain cases. Section 11. Rights and obligations of parties to contract for assignment of receivables. Section 12. Liability of debtor. Section 13. Assignor to be trustee of assignee. Section 14. Liability of debtor in case of an assignor being mircro or small enterprises. Section 15. Principle of debtor protection. Section 16. Defences and right of set off of debtor. Section 17. Modification of original contract. Section 18. Breach of contract. Section 19. Registration of certain assignments of receivables transactions. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Public inspection. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Penalties. Section 22. Penalties for non-compliance of direction of Reserve Bank. Section 23. Offences. Section 24. Cognizance of offences. Section 25. Offences by factors. Section 26. Provisions of this Act to override other laws. Section 27. Application of other laws not barred. Section 28. Limitation. Section 29. Confidentiality of information. Section 30. Power to exempt. Section 31. Provisions of this Act not to apply or affect in certain cases. Section 31A. Power to make regulations. Section 32. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Laying of rules. Section 34. Power to remove difficulties. Section 35. Amendments to certain enactments. Schedule 1.
